action.reasoning: Observation: iter_24 eval achieved new best mean_r2=0.304 with full-data Ridge linear model (threshold=0). The linear model is at optimal capacity for linear modeling, but there may be room for improvement via dimensionality reduction (PCA) to reduce collinearity and noise, potentially boosting generalization. With 24 min and 5 remaining iterations, we have time for quick PCA+Ridge experiment (2-3 min) to see if validation R² improves before submitting final eval. Decision: write pca_linear.py to fit PCA on a 5M training subsample, retain 99.9% variance, train Ridge on principal components, and evaluate on validation. If validation mean_r2 > current best val estimate (0.282), update predict.py to support PCA pipeline and submit eval.
